title: SOCAL-LED LIGHTING D2S 35W Xenon HID Headlight Bulbs - 6000K Crystal White - 66040 66240 85122 OEM High Low Beam Direct Replacement - Pack of 2
features: Super Bright Illumination: Experience unparalleled visibility on the road with SOCAL-LED LIGHTING D2S Xenon HID Headlight bulbs. Their brilliant 6000K cool white lighting enhances night driving safety, making it a must-have upgrade.

OEM Replacement Compatibility: Our D2S HID bulb are designed to replace part numbers 85122, 85122C1, 85122WX, 85122XV, 85122CM, 66040, 66240 and 66240CBI directly, plug-n-play installation without any modifications, providing hassle-free use.

Enhanced Safety Visibility: Our D2S HID bulbs produce sharp, crisp light that cuts through darkness and harsh weather. This feature drastically improves your ability to see and be seen, providing peace of mind as you tackle challenging road trips.

Long-lasting Performance: With a superior lifespan, these D2S Xenon HID Headlight bulbs deliver consistent brightness over time, significantly reducing the need for frequent replacements, which saves you both time and money in the long run.

High Low Beam Functionality: The SOCAL-LED LIGHTING bulbs offer exceptional versatility with high and low beam capabilities. Enjoy a reliable driving experience across different conditions, ensuring optimal visibility and safety.
description: Product Description OEM HID Headlight Direct Replacement Pack of 2, Xenon Headlight 35W HID bulbs for HID (Xenon) equipped vehicles; It is direct replacement for car with factory D1 Series HID Headlight, plug-n-play with no modification to original wirings. Please ensure your car come with factory HID headlight, it will NOT fit the normal halogen headlight car model. Features & Specs: German technology, high quality digital AC HID bulbs Direct replacement for factory HID headlight bulbs Easy to install, Plug-n-Play AMP connectors Input Voltage: DC 9-16V Power: 35W Expected Life: >3500 Hrs. Color Available: 4300K, 6000K, 8000K, 10000K, 12000K Fitment: Please double check the size of the bulb with your car before purchase. Please check your car Owner's Manual. We Suggest you to use online automotive lamp replacement guide to ensure you purchase the right size bulb. Colors available Factory VS Upgrade 4300K VS 8000K Light Blue 6000K Crystal Clear White Color Light Most popular color and best performance light penetrating power. Amazing Deep Blue color Nice looking deep blue color! provide a nice looking for your car, however it i s not as bright as the 6000K as the color makes the light darker! Exotics Pink Purple Color Another deep color bulb for people chases nice looking light, please keep in mind that 10000K & 12000K might not be street legal , please check with your State authority!
